description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic to "my brother." The writer mainly communicates that he arrived at his destination safely, and that he rejoiced to learn of the safe delivery (childbirth) of Muʿazzazah and the wife of Hilāl. The addressee's cousin, Umm Maʿā[nī?] sends her regards.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית ל'אחי'; הכותב מדווח שהגיע ביטחון ליעדו ושמח לשמוע על לידה בטוחה של מעززה ואשת הלאל
